prestazioni: Engine swap to a D16Y8 (1.6L SOHC VTEC, 127hp stock) with a custom billet crankshaft from Toda Racing (stroked to 1.8L, 84mm stroke) paired with JE forged pistons (8.5:1 compression) and Eagle H-beam connecting rods for high-RPM reliability (redline set to 9,000 RPM via Hondata K-Pro ECU with custom camshafts from Skunk2 Pro Series Stage 2, 272° duration, 11.5mm lift).

Forced induction via a Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger (0.63 A/R turbine housing) with a custom top-mount intercooler from GReddy (Type-S, 600hp capacity) and a Tomei 44mm wastegate (external, mounted on a custom 304 stainless steel manifold by HyTech Exhaust). Fuel system upgraded with a Walbro 450LPH in-tank pump, Injector Dynamics ID1000 injectors, and a custom fuel rail from RC Engineering.

Suspension overhaul with Tein Flex Z coilovers (8kg/mm front, 6kg/mm rear springs, 24-way adjustable damping) paired with Cusco front strut tower bars (22mm diameter, 3-point design) and a rear subframe brace from Spoon Sports. Braking system upgraded to Endless CC-R6 rotors (280mm front, 260mm rear) with 4-piston calipers from Wilwood (Dynalite series) and stainless steel braided lines from Goodridge.
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit (fiberglass, bolt-on fenders with 50mm flares) paired with a custom front splitter from Veilside (carbon fiber, 3-piece design with adjustable canards) and a rear diffuser from Seibon Carbon (integrated with dual 3.5" exhaust outlets from HKS Hi-Power).

Custom livery by AutoArt in a "Midnight Pearl" base (Honda NH-624P) with matte black accents (3M 1080 vinyl) and neon green pinstriping (Oracal 651, 1mm width). OEM headlights replaced with custom HID projectors from Morimoto (XB35, 5500K) and LED taillights from V-LED (7447-HP, sequential turn signals).

Interior stripped and reupholstered with Recaro Pole Position seats (fixed-back, carbon fiber shells) wrapped in Alcantara (Kohinoor Automotive, custom pattern) and a MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel (350mm diameter, suede grip). Roll cage by Buddy Club (8-point, bolt-in, chromoly steel) with custom door bars and a fire suppression system from SPA Technique (5lb Halon, dual nozzles).
